2605.29638.title: Classification of non-analyzable word types in web documents to implement an effective Korean e-learning system
2605.29638.paper_summary: E-learning systems should deliver contents that reflect various phenomena of the language as it is used. In addition to formal Korean, e-learning systems that would include real-world Korean expressions such as those in web documents, mobile text messages, or twitter posts, would be useful to high-level learners. We construct two types of corpora: one is made of formal documents like online news articles; the other is made of informal documents like customer reviews about new products in web blogs. By comparing these corpora, we show how expressions differ in these two types of corpora. We survey the main characteristics of the informal corpus. Given that a significant proportion of text is informal, we propose Local Grammar Graphs (LGG) as an appropriate model to treat them effectively in Korean e-learning systems.
2605.29638.paper_summary_zh: E-learning 系統應該提供反映語言使用中各種現象的內容。除了正式的韓語外，包含網頁文件、手機簡訊或推特帖子的現實韓語表達的電子學習系統，對於高級學習者將會非常有用。我們構建了兩種類型的語料庫：一種是由正式文件組成，如線上新聞文章；另一種是由非正式文件組成，如網誌中關於新產品的顧客評論。通過比較這些語料庫，我們展示了這兩種類型的語料庫中表達的差異。我們調查了非正式語料庫的主要特徵。考慮到相當一部分文本是非正式的，我們提出了局部語法圖（LGG）作為在韓語電子學習系統中有效處理它們的合適模型。
2605.29638.author: Sang-Taek Park et.al.
2605.29638.authors: Sang-Taek Park, Ae-Lim Ahn, Eric Laporte, Jee-Sun Nam
